rows.label: qev051501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oho— I can tell at a glance, you know?
You're no ordinary fighter, are you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0002
rows.name:
This city truly is fascinating!
There are fierce warriors everywhere
who could rival the Lars![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0003
rows.name:
...So, you've come to participate in the
Lars Martial Arts Tournament starting now
to prove your strength as well, haven't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0010
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask what the Lars Martial Arts
Tournament is.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0020
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0021
rows.name: Nod without asking questions.

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0004
rows.name:
It is a prestigious event held in our Lars Kingdom
to determine the true greatest warrior under the heavens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0005
rows.name:
It was completely forgotten after our country fell into poverty
and we became the dogs of the Growth, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0006
rows.name:
Oho... As someone who remembers the past, I gathered warriors,
borrowed this location, and finally managed to organize it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0007
rows.name:
It's not just Larsians, either. Fighters from various stars
are participating. It's shaping up to be an unprecedentedly fierce tournament![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0008
rows.name:
What do you say? Now that the Growth's stronghold has fallen,
you've got too much strength and nothing to do with it, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Care to join in?
I guarantee you'll gain an invaluable experience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0010
rows.name:
How valiant of you!
But be warned, this tournament determines the true greatest warrior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's not just Larsians. Fighters from various stars
are participating. It's shaping up to be an unprecedentedly fierce tournament![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Even someone like you might end up
losing your life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0013
rows.name:
What do you say? Will you still do it?
Can you risk your life solely to boast of your martial prowess?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0014
rows.name:
No hesitation— I saw plenty of reckless fools
like you in the past martial arts tournaments![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0015
rows.name:
Oho! Yes, the ones who win the martial arts tournament
are always those fearless battle maniacs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Alright, then go prepare for battle first!
I'll finalize the brackets in the meantime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0017
rows.name:
Hey there, I've decided all the matchups
except for yours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0018
rows.name: We really— have an incredible bunch gathered here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0019
rows.name:
I thought there wouldn't be many
who could best the Lars, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0020
rows.name:
Goodness, the universe is vast!
This is going to be a fascinating tournament![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0021
rows.name: Well then! Are you ready to go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0030
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0031
rows.name: State that you still need to prepare.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0040
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0041
rows.name: Nod emphatically.

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Come back when you're in perfect condition!
The ones participating in this tournament are beasts with sharpened fangs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0023
rows.name:
Even someone like you will lose your life
if you make a mistake![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0024
rows.name:
Your first opponent is the princess of the prestigious Zo family.
Despite being a woman, her swordsmanship is exceptional![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0025
rows.name:
It seems she's acquainted with you.
She was quite delighted when she heard
you were her first opponent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0026
rows.name:
Oho, I don't know what happened between you two,
but settle it all in the midst of battle![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0027
rows.name:
That is the karma of us warriors!
We communicate with voiceless voices through our strength![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0028
rows.name:
To think you'd tame a wild horse of a princess
just like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0029
rows.name:
Oho, you truly are no ordinary fighter!
I'm already looking forward to your next match.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0030
rows.name:
How are you feeling? Your next opponent is already prepared.
If you're ready, shall we start right away?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0050
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0051
rows.name: State that you need a little preparation.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0060
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0061
rows.name: Nod without hesitation.

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0031
rows.name:
I see! Then hurry up and prepare!
And show me your power in perfect condition![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0032
rows.name:
Your next opponent is a Nopon, but...
there are a few special circumstances involved.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0033
rows.name:
I've made a tiny exception
and allowed them to fight using a certain method.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0034
rows.name:
Well, consider it a new way to test one's skills
in a martial arts tournament held on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0035
rows.name:
Unleash all of your strength against them!
Show them what a true warrior is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0036
rows.name:
...A magnificent battle! To think you'd brush aside
that pack of wild beasts so easily![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0037
rows.name:
Fufu, you truly are the real deal!
My eye for talent wasn't wrong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0070
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask about your next opponent.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0080
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0081
rows.name:
Boast that it's only natural
with your level of strength.

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0038
rows.name:
Gathering intelligence already, are we?!
Oho, you are a thoroughly prepared warrior![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0039
rows.name:
Oho, if you can keep up that bravado
even when facing your next opponent, then you're the real deal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0040
rows.name:
Next up is a warrior from the Cavern Clan,
the most ferocious even among those freakishly strong Bias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0041
rows.name:
Even with your strength, it won't be an opponent
you can easily handle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0042
rows.name:
—Well? Can you do it?
If you head into battle half-hearted,
you'll end up being eaten alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0090
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0091
rows.name: State that you still need to prepare.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0100
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0101
rows.name: Nod emphatically.

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0043
rows.name:
There's still time before the next match.
You'd better prepare thoroughly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0044
rows.name:
Oho, this Lars Martial Arts Tournament
has been held since ancient times.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0045
rows.name:
Occasionally, aliens from the outside
would participate, but hardly any of them
could ever match us Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0046
rows.name:
...However, your next opponent
has advanced through the brackets by making a mockery of Lars warriors,
winning without letting them lay a single finger on her![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0047
rows.name:
You rarely see an alien warrior like that.
I'm sure it'll be an interesting match between the two of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0048
rows.name:
...Now, that Bias warrior will be here soon.
Show me a battle that makes my blood boil![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0049
rows.name:
A fight where beasts face off against each other
even with their limbs torn apart—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0050
rows.name:
A true death match! Both this warrior named Slovity
and you fought with everything you had![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0051
rows.name:
Now then, what will you do?
Your next opponent seems ready, but
you just had a fierce battle. Want to rest a bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0110
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0111
rows.name: Tell him you'll rest a bit.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0120
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0121
rows.name: Tell him you can go right now.

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0052
rows.name:
Understood!
Heal your wounded body for now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0053
rows.name:
Let me know when you're ready.
Show me another wonderful match![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0054
rows.name:
Can't wait, can you?!
Your next opponent is an Earthling, just like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0055
rows.name:
Like a battle-hardened BLADE, they've won their way
up to here with precise combat tactics.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0056
rows.name:
However, on the surface, they look like an Earthling, but...
the flow of their energy is somewhat strange.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0057
rows.name:
To me, it feels like they are something entirely different...
from you Earthlings...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0058
rows.name:
...Well, as a Lars proverb says, "More truths
slumber within battle than in a thousand words."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0059
rows.name:
You'll know once you cross blades.
Expose everything with your strength![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0060
rows.name: To think their true identity was a Definia![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0061
rows.name:
Oho, to have connections with that sort of bunch...
Just who in the world are you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0130
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0131
rows.name:
Explain your connection
with the Definia.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0140
rows.name: Keep Secret

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0141
rows.name:
Hide your connection
with the Definia.

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0062
rows.name:
Oho... Now that's interesting.
To think you were the one who annihilated them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0063
rows.name: A strong warrior carries history with them—I suppose.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0064
rows.name:
Oho, that's fine then.
In this martial arts tournament, the past is nothing but an illusion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0065
rows.name: It matters not what shadows you carry, as long as you are strong.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0066
rows.name:
...Now then, shall we move on to the next battle?!
Excite the tournament with another heated fight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0150
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0151
rows.name: Tell him you'll cool down a bit.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0160
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0161
rows.name:
Tell him you'll crush your next opponent
with your burning momentum.

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0067
rows.name:
I see, that's fine too.
Sometimes you need to suppress your boiling blood in battle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0068
rows.name:
Talk to me once you've calmed down enough.
Your next opponent is already prepared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0069
rows.name:
Oho, what a hot-blooded fellow!
A warrior must be exactly like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0070
rows.name:
Your next opponent is an eccentric type
who is the complete opposite of you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0071
rows.name:
Well, it's not like blood even flows through it...
It's a troublesome foe you can't defeat by normal means.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0072
rows.name:
I think this battle will feel very different from the ones before,
but shatter it with your burning passion![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0073
rows.name:
How was that? Were you surprised when a machine doll
suddenly appeared in your last match?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0074
rows.name:
Truthfully, I allowed it to participate because I believed
Lars warriors would never lose to a bloodless machine like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0075
rows.name:
Pathetically, they were defeated one after another,
and I was starting to wonder what to do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0076
rows.name:
Goodness, the technological capabilities of the Orpheans
and Ma-non are truly extraordinary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0077
rows.name:
...And your power, which surpassed even that,
was exactly as he described![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0078
rows.name:
Now, it's finally time for the semifinals!
Well? Are you ready?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0170
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0171
rows.name: Ask who "he" is.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0180
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0181
rows.name: Nod and say you are ready.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0190
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0191
rows.name:
State that you are not
ready yet.

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0079
rows.name:
If you're curious, hurry up and finish preparing!
You'll understand naturally once the battle begins![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0080
rows.name:
...Oho, he was boasting that he would settle things
with you once and for all this time, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0081
rows.name:
Alright!
The Lars Martial Arts Tournament is finally reaching its climax![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0082
rows.name: Will it be that man's grandson, or will it be you—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0083
rows.name:
Let me witness closely who will inherit
the title of the greatest under the heavens![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0084
rows.name:
...Now, the semifinals are finally beginning!
Slam everything you have into him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0085
rows.name:
Understood.
Then hurry up and finish preparing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0086
rows.name:
Your next opponent has been waiting impatiently
for you all this time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0088
rows.name:
It's just a feeling, but from the moment I first laid eyes on you,
I thought you might just win your way up here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0089
rows.name:
Now, there's no need to hold anything back.
Show me all of your power![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0200
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0201
rows.name:
Tell him you will prepare a bit more
for the final battle.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0210
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0211
rows.name: Tell him you are ready.

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0090
rows.name: I see. Does that mean you are still not at 100%...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0091
rows.name:
Oho! What a terrifying warrior!
Then go and prepare to your heart's content![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0092
rows.name:
I see, I see!
Then your opponent for the finals will be here shortly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0093
rows.name:
Wait—with a heart free of hesitation!
Show me the brilliance of power pushed beyond its limits![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0094
rows.name:
I had heard about you from Zang, but...
You are incredible, [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0095
rows.name:
I haven't been this fired up since
the time I fought his old man![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0096
rows.name:
Ahh...! It completely brought back the memories
of those days when I threw my life away
in pure pursuit of strength...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0220
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0221
rows.name: Praise Zo Ozuchi's strength.

rows.label: qev051501_JNK0230
rows.name: Boast

rows.label: qev051501_SEL0231
rows.name:
Boast that your strength isn't
limited to just this.

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0097
rows.name:
What a pleasant fellow!
Being able to fight a warrior like you
is my greatest pride.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0098
rows.name:
Oho, I bet...!
You truly are unfathomable.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0099
rows.name:
—Alright! Winner of the Lars Martial Arts Tournament,
[ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0100
rows.name:
From today onward, you are the greatest under the heavens.
I'm going on a warrior's pilgrimage right away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0101
rows.name:
I'll beat this rusty body back into shape and someday
challenge you again as a contender![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0102
rows.name:
Oho! Carry the weight of being the greatest under the heavens,
and don't you dare lose to anyone until the next Lars Martial Arts Tournament begins![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0103
rows.name:
Farewell until that day!
The peerless [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0104
rows.name: What's wrong? Did you lose your nerve?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051501_MSG0105
rows.name:
Your opponent is right over there!
Now! Show me your power![ST:wait ]
